changeSet.author: juliwolf
changeSet.sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_unique_subscription_asset_user_deleted_flag ON "subscrption" (owner_user_id, asset_id, deleted_flag) WHERE deleted_flag = false;

changeSet.author: juliwolf
changeSet.sql: insert into entity (entity_id, entity_name, deleted_flag) values ('dd6be94c-a022-4553-9d2e-d09226cebe58', 'SUBSCRIPTION', false) ON CONFLICT DO nothing;

changeSet.author: juliwolf
